name: Harry Connick Jr.
abstract: Joseph Harry Fowler Connick Jr. (born September 11, 1967) is an American singer, pianist, composer, actor, and former television host.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Harry Connick, Jr. and Branford Marsalis with Miguel Zenón
Harry Connick Jr.
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ellis Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Contrary to that, when you get the kind of support, especially parental support, which you get as a kid with a lot of talent, both parents are very supportive of him, then you get a Harry Connick, Jr. His parents are very supportive.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellis Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: Harry Connick was becoming a star and RCA, Steve Backer was looking for a vocalist. He comes in to see me at The Algonquin and he says, “let’s get you on the label.”
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Wendell Brunious
about_quotes.evidence: Sometimes I use Shannon Powell who is a really great drummer from New Orleans. He was Harry Connick Jr.’s drummer with the big band...
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendell Brunious interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Danny Barker
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER: Harry Connick, yeah. [No response from Danny Barker regarding a personal connection to Harry Connick]
about_quotes.doc_title: Danny Barker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: Well thinking of the two biggest singer breakthroughs, Harry Connick in the recent decade and Diana Krall...
about_quotes.doc_title: Sherrie Maricle interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 18, 2001 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: Shannon Powell... won Down Beat awards best drummer of the year when he was playing with Harry Connick, Jr.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019
